title: Peter Feltman
compiled_truth: Peter Feltman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-09 to 2001-08-22), Peter Feltman sent 7 and received 46 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (7), [Mathis Conner](people/mathis-conner) (6), [Mark Greenberg](people/mark-greenberg) (5), [Lbautista](people/lbautista-flagtelecom) (2), [Rex Shelby](people/rex-shelby) (2).
